heading: Cross reference
label: 226 Cross reference
text: For deductions in respect of a decedent, see section 691.
notes: Amendments2025— successively renumbered sections 224 and 225 of this title as this section.Pub. L. 119–212003— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 108–173section 223 of this title2001— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 107–16section 222 of this title1997— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 99–514, § 135(b)(1)section 223 of this title, amended section generally, substituting “reference” for “references” in section catchline, striking out par. (1) which referred to section 1202 for deduction for long-term capital gains in the case of a taxpayer other than a corporation, and striking out par. (2) designation.Pub. L. 99–514, § 301(b)(5)(A)1981— successively renumbered sections 221 and 222 of this title as this section.Pub. L. 97–341976— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 94–455section 220 of this title1974— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 93–406section 219 of this title1971— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 92–178section 218 of this title1964— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 88–272section 217 of this title
